title: Midnight Colby Curry
description: An earthy Thai-inspired dish featuring colby jack cheese that satisfies a midnight craving with its crisp texture and rich flavor profile, low in calories.

ingredients.name: 1/2 block Colby Jack cheese, crumbled
ingredients.notes: Choose a low-calorie version if available.

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the crumbled Colby Jack cheese with the diced tomatoes and ginger.
Whisk in the lime juice and stir until smooth. Cook over low heat for about 5 minutes or until heated through and slightly thickened.
Stir in the minced garlic and chopped green onions, stirring well to incorporate.
Spoon the mixture into small individual serving bowls.
Top each bowl with a dollop of crumbled Colby Jack cheese.
